subreq_desc: Named oversight body with responsibilities in ToR/charters
Oversight body skills/competencies to govern climate
How and how often the body is informed
Oversight of targets + link to remuneration
Management role and integration with functions
Specific climate risks/opportunities identified (physical vs transition)
Time horizons defined and linked to planning
Business model/value chain effects and concentration
Strategy/decision-making + transition plan with assumptions and progress
Financial effects quantified + reflected in financial planning
Climate resilience via scenario analysis (1.5C + high-warming)
Processes to identify and assess climate risks (inputs/scenarios)
Monitoring and changes from prior period
Climate factored into executive remuneration (% linked)
